features.label: Image Editor
features.desc: Full image editor with header (undo/redo, rotate, flip, zoom, save dropdown), left toolbar (10 tools: select, crop, rotate, resize, adjust, filter, draw, eraser, text, overlay), right context panel, canvas with zoom/pan, footer with live info. Keyboard shortcuts for all actions. Saves to Downloads panel.
features.howto: DevHub → Image Editor → Drop or open any image
